background.description: A cinematic, ultra-high-quality render of a futuristic luxury real estate building at night, illuminated by electric cyan and deep blue neon lights, standing majestically against a dark space background.

camera.movement: Smooth, majestic tracking shot glowing nodes activating
camera.angle: Low angle looking up at the glowing architecture
